_sample_provenance: Captured 2026-06-08 from scripts/00_smoke_test.py against the supplied CMC Pro API key (Basic plan).
_dev_doc_reference: §3.3 endpoint [F]; §3.9 M0 back-fill triggers degraded path
_action_taken: GLOBAL_METRICS_HISTORICAL_AVAILABLE = False in config/constants.py; scripts/01_pull_data.py calls pull_global_metrics_latest_only and persists a 1-row snapshot to data/processed/global_metrics_latest.parquet so dominance/cross factors degrade cleanly.
_upgrade_path: Re-run 00_smoke_test.py after upgrading to Standard or higher; the smoke test will overwrite this placeholder with a real sample and scripts/01_pull_data.py will switch to the full historical path automatically.

status.error_message: Your API Key subscription plan doesn't support this endpoint.
